title: Protector
tmdbOverview: Nikki's life is shattered when her daughter is kidnapped. Thrust into the criminal underworld while hunted by cops and military, she must fight to rescue her child.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Protector is a action and thriller film from United States. It has a 5.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
